channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Employee Longevity and Benefits Packages
item.description: Morgan Stanley analysts suggest that increasing lifespans present challenges for talent, productivity, and retention.

item.title: Plaid's CFO anticipates increased AI adoption
item.description: The fintech company is preparing for an AI-driven financial system.

item.title: Trump to meet with President Xi, invites Musk and Cook
item.description: Ahead of meetings in Beijing, Trump described President Xi as "respected by all."

item.title: SAP CEO on AI: Operational context is key
item.description: The focus should be on integrating AI within ERP systems, according to SAP’s CEO, rather than relying solely on chatbot interfaces.
